title: St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu
tagline: St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu is one of the important churches in South India, located at a village named Puthencavu (near Chengannur), Alappuzha district in Kerala state of India. The church is one of the oldest Christian churches in the Central Travancore region of Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Puthencavu
topPlaces.description: Puthencavu is a village in Alappuzha District of Kerala, India, located 2 km east of Chengannur along the southern bank of the river Pamba. The village is around 2 km from Arattupuzha, and can be easily accessed from Chengannur and Arattupuzha.

topPlaces.name: Othera
topPlaces.description: Othara or Othera is an Indian village in Kerala state. It is located in Taluk Tiruvalla, Revenue Division Thiruvalla in Pathanamthitta district.

topPlaces.name: Chengannur Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Chengannur Mahadeva Temple is a prominent Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva and located in the town of Chengannur in the South Indian state of Kerala. The temple is one of the major Shiva temples in Kerala, along with the Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple, Kaduthruthy Mahadeva Temple, Vaikom Temple, Ernakulam Shiva Temple and Vadakkunnathan Temple.

topPlaces.name: Old Syrian Church, Chengannur
topPlaces.description: Pazhaya Suriyani Pally a.k.a. Old Syrian Church, Chengannur is an ancient Syrian Christian church of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kallisseri Azhakiyakavu Devi Temple, Chengannur
topPlaces.description: Azhakiyakavu Devi Temple is situated at Kallisseri in Chengannur taluk of Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Bhadrakali and is one of the 30 temples in Central Travancore area where the ancient Dravidian ritualistic art form of Padayani is performed annually.

topPlaces.name: Kadavil Malika
topPlaces.description: Kadavil Malika is a historic place in India, associated with the origin of the Maramon Convention. It is a house in Kallissery on the banks of River Pamba and was built by Unnittan Kathanar (1767–1852) and his son Abraham Kathanar (1822–1884) also known as Kadavil Achen, in the early 19th century.

topPlaces.name: Thrichittatt Maha Vishnu Temple
topPlaces.description: The Thrichittatt Mahavishnu Temple (also called Thiruchenkundrur and Imayavarappan temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located in Chengannur, Alappuzha District, Kerala, South India. Constructed in the Kerala style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, by Nammalvar, one of the Sri Vaishnava saint-poets of the 8th century called the Alvars.

topPlaces.name: Mundankavu
topPlaces.description: Mundankavu is a village situated 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from Chengannur town centre in Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It lies on the banks of the river Pampa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Orthodox Cathedral, Puthencavu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Puthencavu, Othera, Chengannur Mahadeva Temple, Old Syrian Church, Chengannur, Kallisseri Azhakiyakavu Devi Temple, Chengannur.
